name: "\U0001F4A1 Feature Request"

labels: enhancement

## 💡 What feature do you want?
<!-- Clear description of what you want added -->


## 🔥 What problem does it solve?
<!-- Why do you need this? What can't you do right now? -->


## 🎯 How should it work?
<!-- Describe the ideal behavior. Be specific. -->


## 🖼️ Example / Reference
<!-- Screenshot, sketch, or "like Cursor does X" -->


## 📦 Which part of KaizerIDE?
- [ ] Chat / AI Agent
- [ ] Code Editor (Monaco)
- [ ] File Explorer
- [ ] Settings
- [ ] Terminal / Commands
- [ ] Thinking / Reasoning
- [ ] UI / Design
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Other: ___

## 🙋 Will you implement this?
- [ ] Yes, I'll submit a PR
- [ ] No, just a suggestion
